q: How to build a business that doesn't break when a single API goes down
diagnostic: The Grand Strategist holds: the supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting. The supreme art of operations is to absorb disruption without breaking. Antifragility is not resilience — it is the ability to become stronger from shock.
answer: The Grand Strategist holds: the supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting. The supreme art of operations is to absorb disruption without breaking. Antifragility is not resilience — it is the ability to become stronger from shock.
description: Brittle integration — as systems become more automated, they become more fragile. Geopolitical volatility compresses planning horizons to 48 hours.
symptom: One tariff change disrupts the quarter. One API outage stops the factory. The CEO no longer understands how their own company works.
